name: La Belle Le Parfum
description: A seductive and intense fragrance built around vanilla, pear, and tonka bean.
about: La Belle Le Parfum is a richer and deeper interpretation of the original La Belle, offering a sensual and addictive trail with a warm gourmand signature.

name: Good Girl Blush
description: A soft and romantic reinterpretation of the iconic Good Girl, blending fresh florals with creamy vanilla.
about: Good Girl Blush is a lighter and more delicate version of the original Good Girl, expressing femininity with a soft floral and creamy sweetness.

name: Valentino Donna Born in Roma
description: A modern haute couture fragrance with a vibrant floral bouquet and a warm woody base.
about: Valentino Donna Born in Roma celebrates individuality and modern femininity with a blend of couture elegance and edgy street-inspired style.

name: Guidance 46
description: An intensified extrait version of Guidance with deeper, richer and more luxurious layers of creamy florals and woods.
about: Guidance 46 is the extrait de parfum concentration of the iconic Guidance, offering a more intense, creamy, and long-lasting experience with elevated depth and richness.

name: I Want Choo With Love
description: A playful and addictive fruity floral fragrance with a romantic and vibrant twist.
about: I Want Choo With Love is a sweeter and more romantic interpretation of the original I Want Choo, centered around juicy cherry and soft floral warmth.

name: Paradoxe Intense
description: A bold and intense reinterpretation of Paradoxe, blending floral elegance with deep amber warmth.
about: Paradoxe Intense is a richer and warmer version of the original Prada Paradoxe, emphasizing sensual amber and creamy floral depth.
